title: Habits file
description: Shape of dashboard/habits-data.json (the first-run seed) and of any exported habit list. A wrapper object holding a `habits` array; `_DEMO`/`_comment` convention keys are allowed. `id`, `notionId`, `weekOf`, `days` and `updatedAt` are filled in client-side on load (this week, all unchecked), so seed records may omit them.

id.description: Local id; generated client-side on load.

keystone.description: A foundational habit that protects the others.

weekOf.description: Monday of the tracked week, YYYY-MM-DD. Filled client-side when omitted.

days.description: Seven day booleans; created client-side (all false) when omitted in a seed file.
